items.title: Sex Differences in Physician Attrition from Clinical Practice Across Specialties: A Nationwide, Longitudinal Analysis
items.description: CONCLUSIONS: US female physicians are significantly more likely to leave clinical practice than male counterparts at every age, across specialties and practice locations.
